title: Loan-Application
description: Uniform Residential Loan Application (Form 1003) for a mortgage.

BorrowerName.description: Full legal name of the primary borrower

CoBorrowerName.description: Full legal name of co-borrower if applicable

BorrowerAddress.description: Current street address of the borrower

LoanAmount.description: Total loan amount requested in dollars

LoanPurpose.description: Purpose of loan: Purchase, Refinance, or Cash-Out Refinance

PropertyType.description: Type of property: Single Family, Condo, Townhouse, Multi-Family

LoanType.description: Loan type: Conventional, FHA, VA, USDA

InterestRate.description: Proposed interest rate as a percentage (e.g. 6.75)

AnnualIncome.description: Borrower's annual gross income in dollars

MonthlyIncome.description: Borrower's monthly gross income in dollars (AnnualIncome / 12)

MonthlyDebt.description: Total monthly debt obligations in dollars

AssetType.description: Type of asset: Checking, Savings, 401k, Investment, etc.

PropertyDescription.description: Optional 1-3 sentence narrative describing the subject property — type, location, condition, notable features.

BorrowerBackground.description: Optional 1-3 sentence narrative about the borrower's financial profile and reason for the loan.

EmploymentNarrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence narrative about the borrower's employment history and stability.

LoanPurposeNarrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence explanation of the loan purpose and intended use of funds.

AssetSummaryNarrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence summary of the borrower's overall asset position.
